hooks.statusMessage: Checking staged markdown before git commit
hooks.command:
/bin/bash -lc 'payload=$(cat); case "$payload" in *"git commit"* ) ;; * ) exit 0 ;; esac; files=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMRT | grep -E "\.md$" || true); [ -n "$files" ] || exit 0; style=$(mktemp /tmp/codex-mdl-style.XXXXXX.rb); trap "rm -f \"$style\"" EXIT; printf "rule \"MD004\", :style => \"*\"\nrule \"MD007\", :indent => 4\n" > "$style"; failed=0; while IFS= read -r file; do [ -n "$file" ] || continue; mdl --rules MD004,MD007 -s "$style" "$file" || failed=1; done <<EOF
$files
EOF
[ "$failed" -eq 0 ] || { printf "markdown lint failed for staged markdown files\n" >&2; exit 2; }'
